title: Bose Drops Lifestyle Ultra Wireless Speaker: Here’s Where to Shop It Online
summary: Upgrade your home audio with this premium and versatile wireless speaker from Bose — shop it for $299.
body: All products and services featured are independently chosen by editors. However, Billboard may receive a commission on orders placed through its retail links, and the retailer may receive certain auditable data for accounting purposes. When searching for new home audio gear, it may be tough to find the best speakers that have amazing sound quality that’s housed inside of a sleek, stylish and minimalist home decor design. However, we found one of the best speakers for your home. Priced at $299, the Bose Lifestyle Ultra Wireless Speaker delivers crisp and rich premium audio at home. It’s now available for purchase at Best Buy. $299 Buy Now at Best Buy Although it might look small, it packs a punch in the audio department with detailed, clear, balanced and robust sound that’s large enough to fill a room. The Bose Lifestyle Ultra Wireless Speaker syncs to your smartphone, tablet or laptop via USB-C, Wi-Fi or Bluetooth — which means you can connect multiple devices to the speaker at the same time. In fact, it even has AUX inputs to connect turntables and CD players too. Meanwhile, if you have two of these speakers, then you can sync them together for a ster…
